name: TC-QQ-034-Verify Number/Amount question can be configured and saved successfully

steps.name: Wait for selector getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Fill "Number / Amount question with Number" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Number / Amount question with Number').last()
Fill "Number / Amount question with integer" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Number / Amount question with integer').last()
Fill "Number / Amount question with hour estimate" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('hour estimate', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('hour estimate', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('hour estimate', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('hour estimate', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Number / Amount question with hour estimate').last()

labels.name: titlePath
labels.value: > Chrome > questionnaireQuestions.spec.ts > Questionnaire Questions tab Tests
